rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"If a task says 'verify X exists', the build stage must first create X — a non-existent file fails verification even if the code changes are correct.","scope":"kody pipeline"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Task description 'Verify X includes Y' implies build must produce X with Y section — not just check it exists.","scope":"kody pipeline"}]}
